tasks.summary: Created specdev context command with JSON and human output. Composes existing utilities for assignment state, commands, knowledge files, project notes, and skills. 35 tests passing.
Added knowledge list subcommand with JSON and human output. Scans knowledge branches, extracts titles, reports file counts. 33 tests passing.
Added --json to approve, focus, revise, help, skills-remove, migrate. 46 new tests passing.
Added --json to implement, migrate-legacy, review, skills-install, skills-sync, update. 45 new tests. Suppressed sync output during update --json.
Rewrote session hook to use specdev context --json. Adds phase-relevant commands and knowledge availability. Fallback to filesystem detection if context fails. 14 tests.
